The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will not be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
